name: 3dTshift
author: AFNI Developers
description: Shifts voxel time series from input so that separate slices are aligned to the same temporal origin.

inputs.name: Input dataset
inputs.description: Input dataset to 3dTshift. Can include a sub-brick selector (e.g., prefix+orig[4..$]).

inputs.name: Prefix
inputs.description: Prefix for output file name. Default is 'tshift'.

inputs.name: Ignore Initial Points
inputs.description: Ignore the first 'ii' points. These values will be unchanged in the output and will not be used in detrending or time shifting. Default is 0.

inputs.name: Interpolation Method
inputs.description: Interpolation method. Fourier (default) is most accurate but slowest. Linear is least accurate. Polynomials: cubic, quintic, heptic. Weighted sinc: wsinc5, wsinc9.

inputs.name: TR
inputs.description: Manually set the TR instead of using the value in the dataset header. You can attach a suffix for units.

inputs.name: TR Value
inputs.description: The TR value. Must be greater than 0.

inputs.name: Slice Timing Pattern
inputs.description: Use specified slice time pattern rather than the one in the dataset header.

inputs.name: Pattern File
inputs.description: File containing temporal offsets (one per slice).

inputs.name: Shifting Strategy
inputs.description: How to determine the temporal alignment target. Default is the average of the tpattern values.

type.name: Align to Time Zero
type.description: Align each slice to a specific time offset.

inputs.name: Time Zero
inputs.description: The time offset to align to. Must be between the minimum and maximum slice temporal offsets.

type.name: Align to Slice
type.description: Align each slice to the time offset of a reference slice.

inputs.name: Slice Index
inputs.description: The index of the reference slice. Must be less than the total number of slices.

type.name: Voxel-wise Shifting
type.description: Shift each voxel by a different amount specified in a dataset. Values are fractions of a TR (positive means shift backwards).

inputs.name: Shift Dataset
inputs.description: Dataset containing fractional TR shift values. Must have the same spatial dimensions as the input.

inputs.name: Detrending Strategy
inputs.description: How to handle the mean and linear trend during shifting. Default is to remove both before shifting and add both back after.

type.name: Remove Mean & Trend
type.description: Remove the mean and linear trend before shifting. Do not put them back.

type.name: Remove Trend, Add Mean
type.description: Remove the mean and linear trend before shifting. After shifting, put back only the mean.

type.name: No Detrending
type.description: Do not remove or restore linear trend. Default interpolation becomes heptic if Fourier was set.

inputs.name: Verbose
inputs.description: Print lots of messages while program runs.
